name: O.G.R.R. Cricket
description: The O.G.R.R. Cricket keeps the mobility, leaps, and stabbing damage of the base cricket, but now the entire pursuit feels more aggressive and there is far less downtime between punishes.
behavior: Its night spawn only unlocks after releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab. After that it appears at night on the solar panel overlooking the Pumpkin Patch, dropping into fast leaps and entries so you never settle into a comfortable rhythm.
interactionWithPlayer: If you let its mobility corner you, the fight becomes much harsher than against a normal cricket. It does not beat you through raw bulk; it beats you by forcing late reactions over and over again.
interactionWithCreatures: It works extremely well at capitalizing on openings created by slower variants. In groups, it is often the piece that dives in right after another creature has already forced a block or stolen your attention.
strategy: Keep enough space to read the leap and do not give away greedy punishes after every headbutt. Fresh and stabbing still punish it well, but here calm matters more than trying to race its tempo.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Hit Combo Bite: 110Charged Headbutt: 140Back Kick: 119Leap of Faith: 150

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: Three chained strikes that reward steady blocking rhythm.

abilities.name: Charged Headbutt
abilities.description: Lunges forward and can break guard if your timing is poor.

abilities.name: Back Kick
abilities.description: A reactive kick meant to punish targets behind it.

abilities.name: Leap of Faith
abilities.description: Leaps a long distance to crash down on the target.
